## LibraryRuntime.RolledTruffleVersion class

A resolved view of a rolled truffle version with all references resolved.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RolledTruffleVersion extends ConfectionVersionBase implements IRolledTruffleVersion 
```
**Extends:** [ConfectionVersionBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.confectionversionbase.md)

**Implements:** [IRolledTruffleVersion](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.irolledtruffleversion.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RolledTruffleVersion` class.
